caption: A sequence of frames against a solid black background displays white text for a company called ORCA Media. Initially, the words "ORCA Media" appear alone in the upper center. As the sequence progresses, a new block of text appears in the upper right, stating "For More Information Contact ORCA Media @...". Simultaneously, contact information fades in at the bottom of the screen. This bottom section includes the website "www.orcamedia.net", the phone number "802-224-9901", and the social media handle "#orcamediavt". The text remains stationary and centered, with the different elements appearing sequentially to complete a contact information slide. No people, objects, or locations are visible, as the entire visual consists of text on a black field.
